response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, including C++ (albeit not in the last 5 years), but lacks recent C++ work on Windows, domain expertise in fixed income or capital markets, and any direct experience with SQL Server, Oracle, or financial systems. Their background is skewed toward web/mobile development, scripting, and embedded systems, with minimal alignment to the capital markets role.
strengths: Strong general software engineering background with 13+ years of professional experience
Proven ability to work in diverse technical stacks (C++, D, JavaScript, etc.)
Experience with low-latency applications and high-performance systems
concerns: No recent (5+ years) C++ development on Windows platforms
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
Limited SQL Server/Oracle experience; primarily worked with MongoDB, MySQL, and other databases
